---
title: "LCS_FDA_sim"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(parallel)
library(fda)
begin = Sys.time()
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")
set.seed(8)
n_subj = 250
age <- 0:19
tfine <-  seq(0, 19, length.out = 240)
method <- "normal"
rep_cond <- 4
sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = .1, sd_L = 5, sd_a = 5)

matplot(sim_data$x, sim_data$trajectories[, 1:n_subj], type = "l", lty = 1,
        ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Exponential Decay Trajectories")

```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- simulate_accelerated_longitudinal(Y_full = sim_data$trajectories, n_time_points = 2)

# Plot sparse trajectories
matplot(sim_al_data$x_full, sim_al_data$Y_full, type = "l", lty = 2,
        col = "gray", ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling")
for (i in 1:n_subj) {
  points(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i, pch = 16)
  lines(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i)
}

```

## FDA

```{r}
# Generate initial values depending on method
  if (method == "normal") {
    z02 <- generate_initial_values(
      Lt_list = sim_al_data$Lt,
      Ly_list = sim_al_data$Ly,
      age_grid = age,
      m = rep_cond,
      method = "normal"
    )
  } else if (method == "replicate") {
    z02 <- generate_initial_values(
      Lt_list = sim_data$Lt_true,
      Ly_list = sim_data$Ly_true,
      age_grid = age,
      m = rep_cond,
      method = "replicate"
    )
  } else {
    stop("Invalid method. Use 'normal' or 'replicate'.")
  }

  # Fit models
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(sim_al_data$Ly, sim_al_data$Lt, z02, age,
    optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))
```

```{r}
# Evaluate final model
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = tfine, sim_al_data = sim_al_data, sim_data = sim_data, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)

mean(results$ise_opt)
mean(results$ise_all)
mean(results$ie_opt)
mean(results$ie_all)
mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$mse_all)
mean(results$bias_opt)
mean(results$bias_all)

```

## LCS-CT-SSM

```{r}
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data)
```
```{r}
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data, sim_al_data, plot = TRUE))

mean(results2$ise)
mean(results2$ie)
mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)
```
## Compare LCS and FDA
```{r}
metrics_df<-suppressWarnings(compare_fda_lcs(results, results2, LCS_SSM, plot = TRUE))
```

```{r}
end = Sys.time()
end - begin
```
